column1: # Teaching Example - Demonstrates inconsistent results across studies
# Use For: Teaching heterogeneity and sensitivity analysis
# Scenario: Coffee consumption and heart disease (controversial topic)
# This is EXCELLENT for teaching sensitivity analysis
#   β₁ (Linear):     May not be significant due to inconsistency
#   1. High I² means studies disagree - investigate why!
#      - Different populations (Europe vs Asia vs North America)
#   3. ALWAYS run sensitivity analysis with high I²
#   4. Consider subgroup analysis by study_type or region
#   2. region (Europe vs North America vs Asia)
